entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Grain sorghum (Sorghum bicolor) studied for resistance to pests and moulds

entities.name: CALOCORIS ANGUSTATUS
entities.description: Sorghum head bug, a significant pest of grain sorghum in India

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The geographical region where the sorghum head bug is a major pest

entities.name: HEAD BUG DAMAGE
entities.description: The level of damage caused by Calocoris angustatus to sorghum grains

entities.name: GRAIN MOULDS
entities.description: Fungal infections on sorghum grains, often exacerbated by head bug damage

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO HEAD BUGS
entities.description: The genetic ability of sorghum to resist damage from head bugs

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO GRAIN MOULDS
entities.description: The genetic ability of sorghum to resist fungal grain moulds

entities.name: LINE X TESTER MATING DESIGN
entities.description: A breeding design used to study gene action for resistance traits

entities.name: NATURAL INFESTATION
entities.description: The environment of natural pest exposure under which the study was conducted

entities.name: GENERAL COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: A statistical measure used to evaluate the breeding value of parents in a mating design

entities.name: GENE ACTION
entities.description: The interaction of genes that determines the inheritance of a trait

entities.name: DOMINANCE
entities.description: A type of gene action where one allele masks the effect of another

entities.name: PARTIAL DOMINANCE
entities.description: A type of gene action where the dominant allele does not completely mask the recessive one

entities.name: OVERDOMINANCE
entities.description: A type of gene action where the heterozygote has a more extreme phenotype than either homozygote

entities.name: ADDITIVE GENE ACTION
entities.description: A type of gene action where the effect of alleles adds up

entities.name: NONADDITIVE GENE ACTION
entities.description: Gene action involving dominance or epistasis

entities.name: ICSA 88019
entities.description: A sorghum line showing negative GCA for head bug damage and grain moulds

entities.name: ICSA 88020
entities.description: A sorghum line showing negative GCA for grain moulds

entities.name: ICSA 42
entities.description: A sorghum line showing positive GCA for head bug damage and grain mould severity

entities.name: 296 A
entities.description: A sorghum line showing positive GCA for head bug damage and grain mould severity

entities.name: IS 8891
entities.description: A sorghum tester that produced mould-resistant hybrids

entities.name: IS 15107
entities.description: A sorghum tester that produced mould-resistant hybrids

entities.name: TAM 2566
entities.description: A sorghum tester with coloured grain that produced mould-resistant hybrids

entities.name: SWARNA
entities.description: A sorghum variety that produced susceptible hybrids

entities.name: ICSV 112
entities.description: A sorghum variety that produced susceptible hybrids
